description.id: Bantal memory foam premium yang mengikuti lekuk kepala dan leher, menjaga tulang belakang tetap sejajar sepanjang malam. Distribusi tekanan yang merata membantu meredakan ketegangan otot leher dan bahu, sehingga Anda bangun terasa lebih segar — kenyamanan khas hotel bintang lima di rumah Anda sendiri.
description.en: A premium memory foam pillow that contours to your head and neck, keeping your spine aligned all night long. Even pressure distribution helps relieve tension in the neck and shoulders, so you wake up feeling fresher — five-star hotel comfort right in your own home.
